creator: hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com
text:
xfdesktop and Thunar display fallback icons in 
/usr/local/share/pixmaps/xfdesktop and /usr/local/share/pixmaps/Thunar 
for most file types when /usr/local/lib/gtk-2.0/2.10.0/loaders/svg_loader.so 
from graphics/librsvg2 is not istalled.
They should require librsvg2 installed as RUN_DEPENDS.

How-To-Repeat: Install xfce4 and Thuner and run startxfce4 with/without librsvg2 installed.
